Class PhysicalBook

java.lang.Object
libraryApp.Book
libraryApp.PhysicalBook
public class PhysicalBook extends Book
Represents a physical book in the library system. Extends Book with specific behaviors for tangible books. REFACTORING IMPROVEMENTS: ✓ Added comprehensive JavaDoc documentation ✓ Fixed loadFromData() - was throwing UnsupportedOperationException ✓ Added getDaysOverdue() method that was missing ✓ Improved status message formatting ✓ Better code organization and readability

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • PhysicalBook

      public PhysicalBook(String id, String title, String author, String category, int year, int copies)
      Constructor for creating a physical book.
      Parameters:
      id - Unique book identifier
      title - Book title
      author - Book author
      category - Book category
      year - Publication year
      copies - Number of physical copies available

    • getDaysOverdue

      public long getDaysOverdue()
      Calculates the number of days the book is overdue. REFACTORING: This method was missing and called by GUI.
      Returns:
      Number of overdue days, or 0 if not overdue
